sections.title: 1. EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
sections.content: Acme Corp loses revenue every day from missed inbound messages. The proposal puts in place a smart conversational system that answers every incoming message instantly and qualifies serious leads — without manual intervention. The result: zero missed leads, even outside business hours.

sections.title: 2. THE CHALLENGE
sections.content: Each week, roughly 8 hours are spent answering the same questions across email and social. When a lead waits more than 60 minutes for a reply, the conversion rate drops sharply. Over a month, this represents dozens of warm leads that go cold for no operational reason — they simply weren't answered fast enough.

sections.title: 3. THE PROPOSED SOLUTION
sections.content:
The proposal puts in place an AI Reception Agent that takes every incoming conversation off the team's plate.

Here is what the system does:
• Replies instantly to every incoming message — no lead waits for a human to be available
• Answers the most common questions (pricing, services, location) — removing repetitive interruptions
• Qualifies serious leads with a short structured conversation — only ready-to-buy prospects reach the team
• Notifies the owner the moment a qualified lead is captured — fast handoff, no leads lost in transit

The end result: every message gets answered, every serious lead is captured, and the team focuses on closing — not on triage.

rows: Instant 24/7 replies across email and social DMs
Answers frequent questions: pricing, services, location
Sends a summary the moment a qualified lead is ready
Email + Instagram + Messenger from one setup

sections.title: 5. DELIVERABLES
sections.content:
• A configured AI Reception Agent connected to your channels
• A custom knowledge base built around your offer
• A lead qualification flow tuned to your business
• A live notification system for every qualified lead
• Clear documentation of the full setup

sections.title: 6. TIMELINE
sections.content: Project starts upon receipt of the deposit. Full delivery within two weeks of the start date. Throughout this period, progress will be shared at each milestone for review and feedback.

sections.title: 7. ABOUT
sections.content: YOUR_BUSINESS_NAME works with service businesses to turn manual, time-consuming processes into automated systems that run in the background. The approach is always results-first: starting from the real situation, not from a template.

sections.title: 8. NEXT STEPS
sections.content: If this proposal matches what is needed, a simple confirmation by reply email is all that is required. From there, a 30-minute call will finalise the last details and kick the project off as soon as the deposit is received.
